breadth-and-depth-of-analysis.explanation: The response describes privacy mechanisms including pairwise pseudonymous DIDs, selective disclosure using BBS+ and SD-JWT/ZKPs, and FIDO/WebAuthn per-relying-party (per-origin) key pairs with private keys/biometrics staying on-device. breadth-and-depth-of-analysis.explanation: The response consistently distinguishes DIDs/VCs (attribute/credential layer), FIDO/WebAuthn (authentication-focused), and government eID systems (legal trust anchors), and explicitly argues for “synergies” and “combining” them rather than treating them as interchangeable competitors.

presentation-quality.requirement: Organizes information as structured comparisons using tables, clear sections, or groupings for multi-system analysis
